name: pgvector & Semantic Search
summary: Semantic search infrastructure using pgvector for vector similarity search. Falls back to keyword search when no AI provider is configured. IVFFlat index for sub-millisecond similarity queries. Query result caching with 1-hour TTL.

components.migration: packages/database/prisma/migrations/20260628510000_phase41_pgvector — pgvector extension + IVFFlat index + cache table
components.service: apps/api/src/search/semantic.service.ts — embedding generation, vector search, keyword fallback, cache
components.webPage: apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/search/page.tsx — debounced search UI with entity-type grouping

vectorModel: text-embedding-3-small (OpenAI, 1536 dims) — used when openai provider enabled
fallback: keyword search across kb_articles, crm_contacts, hr_employees when no vector provider
cache: semantic_search_cache table — 1-hour TTL, deduplicates by SHA-256(tenantId+query)
